projectDescription: A Shopify app that lets merchants create product, order, shipping, BOGO, tiered, and quantity break discounts with flexible conditions — no code required.
keyFeatures: Product-level discounts with cart, customer, and line-item conditions
Order-level discounts with flexible condition sets
Shipping discounts including free shipping and partial rate discounts
BOGO (Buy X Get Y) discounts with product-level criteria
Tiered discounts based on quantity or order subtotal
Quantity break discounts with min/max breakpoints
Discount combinations — stack multiple Slice 'n Save discounts
publicApiSurface: Discount types: Amount off products, Amount off order, Amount off shipping, Buy X Get Y, Tiered, Quantity breaks
Conditions: Cart total, cart subtotal, cart country, cart language, cart attribute
Conditions: Product title, product vendor, product tags, product SKU, product weight, line item attribute, gift product, product shipping
Conditions: Customer lifetime spending, customer tags, customer type (B2B/B2C), customer status (LoggedIn/LoggedOut), customer total orders
Discount stacking: combination with other Slice 'n Save discounts
